title: Landfall Essentials
description: A mod to provide our server custom administrative and QoL functionality!
body:
# Landfall Essentials Mod

Landfall Essentials is a server-utility mod for Minecraft, built with NeoForge, designed to enhance server management and player experience.

## Features

Currently, Landfall Essentials includes the following features:

*   **Home System:**
    *   Allows players to set and teleport to named home locations.
    *   Configurable limits, cooldowns, and bed requirements.
*   **Karma System:**
    *   Tracks player karma based on configurable actions.
    *   Integrates with other systems for rewards/consequences.
*   **TPA System:** Request to teleport to other players.
*   **Seen System:** Tracks when players were last seen online.
*   **Moderation Tools:** Enhanced moderation tools.
*   **BlueMap Toggle:** Allows players to toggle their BlueMap visibility.
*   **Trophy Items:** Various trophy items for our community.
